---
title: "Cartography and Geo-Spatial Techniques"
subtitle: "The science and art of map-making and spatial data representation."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include cartography/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Cartography and Geo-Spatial Techniques** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include cartography/01-basics-of-cartography.md >}}

{{< include cartography/02-map-projections.md >}}

{{< include cartography/03-topographical-geological-maps.md >}}

{{< include cartography/04-introduction-to-gis-rs.md >}}

---

## Quick Reference

{{< include cartography/08-key-scholars-cartography.md >}}

---

{{< include cartography/09-quick-reference.md >}}
